meaning: n.拉汀语(奥地利蒂罗尔州的方言),说拉汀语的人
examples: Think of how long we looked for Osama Bin Ladin in similarly murky circumstances.
Steven Ladin, a 34-year-old marketing executive from Minneapolis, stamps emails with his Twitter and LinkedIn addresses.
The plateau up ahead was the setting for one of the oldest and strangest of all the Ladin legends.
